body.title: No speculative flags — build to intent, gate go-live with a ticket
body.statement: Never add a speculative capability flag (the IGOR_*_ENABLED pattern, or any config switch for a capability that does not exist yet). Build to the intent, and file a go-live-when ticket that flips the real gate when the capability lands. Igor-specific: Igor USES systems, it does not contain them — no UU code grows Igor-shaped couplings, and UU stays importable with no TheIgors/Igor presence at all.
body.why: A dead switch reads as live capability — confabulated surface a future session will trust (CP1). The flag's existence is a claim; claims that nothing can observe are exactly what the audit gates exist to keep out of the tree.
